name: RowCtPremRateRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte AS ( SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MAX(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.TrgtSys}' AND SRC_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.SrcSys}' AND SUBJ_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.SubjCd}' AND ROW_CT_BAL_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} GROUP BY SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD ) UPDATE T SET T.ROW_CT_BAL_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC AS T JOIN cte ON T.TRGT_SYS_CD = cte.TRGT_SYS_CD AND T.SRC_SYS_CD = cte.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD = cte.SUBJ_CD WHERE T.RUN_CYC_NO <= cte.RUN_CYC_NO AND T.ROW_CT_BAL_IN = 'N';

Annotations:
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Product with a value \"N\" in the  ROW_CT_BAL_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Set ROW_CT_BAL_IN to 'Y'
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been balanced with respect to IDS for each of the run cycles processed.
Balancing Premium Rate Row Count Balancing Indicator Update
Job name:
RowCtPremRateRunCycUpd_EE
